Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Veloz Contractors to get the job done right.

“Veloz Contractors did an amazing job on my kitchen remodel! They transformed my old, outdated kitchen into a modern, functional space. The team was professional, courteous, and always on time. I highly recommend them!”

Maria G. Kitchen Renovation
Jul 15, 2024

“I had a leak in my roof after a recent storm, and Veloz Contractors responded quickly and efficiently. They repaired the damage and provided a thorough inspection to ensure there were no other issues. Great service!”

David S. Roof Repair
Aug 2, 2024

“I absolutely love my new bathroom! Veloz Contractors took my vision and turned it into a reality. The quality of the workmanship is outstanding, and the attention to detail is impeccable. Thank you!”

Jessica L. Bathroom Remodeling
Sep 10, 2024

“Veloz Contractors poured a new concrete patio for my backyard, and it looks fantastic. The team was professional, efficient, and the price was very reasonable. I would definitely use them again.”

Michael B. Concrete Work
Oct 5, 2024

“I hired Veloz Contractors to paint the interior of my condo, and they did a great job. The colors look beautiful, and the finish is flawless. The team was respectful of my property and cleaned up thoroughly after the job was done.”

Sarah K. Painting Services
Nov 20, 2024

“We hired Veloz to remodel our entire home in Coconut Grove, and we couldn't be happier. They handled everything from the design to the finishing touches, and the result is stunning. They understand the unique challenges of remodeling older homes in Miami and delivered a fantastic result.”

Robert P. Residential Remodeling
Dec 1, 2024
